response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience with a strong foundation in TypeScript, Node.js, and modern web frameworks (React, Ember.js, Nest.js-like patterns). His background in scalable systems, REST APIs, and relational databases aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his focus has been more on senior/lead positions, and while his skills are relevant, his depth in PostgreSQL and AWS (beyond basic EKS/ECS) is not explicitly highlighted. His adaptability and pragmatic approach to tooling suggest he could quickly ramp up for the renewable energy/construction tech domain.
strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React/Ember.js
Proven ability to build scalable, production-grade systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of mails)
Strong architectural skills with clean software practices (TDD, CI/CD, Kubernetes deployment) and exposure to modern data integration workflows
concerns: Limited explicit experience with PostgreSQL (primary database requirement) compared to MongoDB
No direct mention of Nest.js, though React experience is strong; TypeScript proficiency is high
High seniority level (Staff/Senior roles) may indicate potential overqualification for a junior/mid-level position
